title: Jatar Deul
tagline: Jatar Deul — spiritual town of West Bengal

overview.short: Jatar Deul is located in district South 24 Parganas of the Indian state West Bengal.
overview.description: Jatar Deul is located in district South 24 Parganas of the Indian state West Bengal. This is a brick temple and is datable between the 10th and 11th century on the basis of its architecture. However, this type of brick temple we can see at Nebia Khera, Uttar Pradesh.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Jatar Deul?
faq.a: The best time to visit Jatar Deul is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Jatar Deul?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (74 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (67 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Jatar Deul?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Jatar Deul at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Jatar Deul?
faq.a: Stays in Jatar Deul start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Jatar Deul?
faq.a: The top attractions are Sonatikri, Nalgora, Chuprijhara, Raydighi Abad, Bhubankhali.
